nodes.name: Red-tailed newtonia
nodes.summary: The red-tailed newtonia (Newtonia fanovanae) is a species of bird in the family Vangidae. It is endemic to Madagascar. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. References External links BirdLife Species Factsheet.
nodes.shortSummary: The red-tailed newtonia (Newtonia fanovanae) is a species of bird in the family Vangidae. It is endemic to Madagascar.

nodes.name: Newtonia
nodes.summary: Newtonia（Newtonia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如Archbold's newtonia、Common newtonia、Dark newtonia等4种鸟类。

nodes.name: Red-tailed newtonia
nodes.summary: Red-tailed newtonia（Newtonia (bird) fanovanae）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Red-tailed newtonia。
